text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During a break in our training session...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yay, I did it! I improved my time again!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Recently, I've really been in tip-top shape! I feel
like I can do anything... Because...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sob... Well... you see... the reason why I got this fast is...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Because you always, always do your best to guide me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about it makes me so happy it hurts!
Thank you so very, very muuuch!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: When you go full tilt at it... sniffle... that's when I can go full tilt tooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moved by Ticket's tears of joy, I swear to myself
to keep working as hard as I can.
